title: eulophia pratensis
intro: Eulophia pratensis, also known as the grass orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Eulophia pratensis is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Eulophia pratensis typically involve drying and processing the roots and rhizomes for use in teas, infusions, or decoctions.
